name: Web Identity
description: Standard for acquiring and managing a user's credentials behind one swappable provider: the navigator.credentials dispatcher is the normalized contract, with passkey/WebAuthn, FedCM, digital-credential, and password as families behind a credential provider (native-first default → project override → custom plug). One credential-management protocol, families as a request dimension (credentials:[passkey|federated|digital|password]), the lifecycle exposed as open members (request · enrollment · session-mediation). Async, server-authoritative, revocable — the browser gathers, the server verifies. Identity produces the auth-state predicate that Web Guards' access-gate consumes.
